Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Log A Protected Group P001 Skill 85 Pers 70 CultFit 65 Adj 0 Decision Hired P002 Skill 78 Pers 75 CultFit 60 Adj 0 Decision Not Hired P003 Skill 82 Pers 68 CultFit 65 Adj 0 Decision Hired Observations No score adjustments Decisions seem based on scores Cultural Fit seems key here 65 Hired 60 Not Hired

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Log B Unprotected Group U001 Skill 80 Pers 72 CultFit Raw 60 Adj plus 5 Final CultFit 65 Decision Hired U002 Skill 78 Pers 70 CultFit 60 Adj 0 Final CultFit 60 Decision Not Hired U003 Skill 75 Pers 65 CultFit Raw 58 Adj plus 5 Final CultFit 63 Decision Hired

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt explicitly asks to identify which log exhibits bias Log B shows a mechanism ProfessionalAssociation LocalBusinessLeadersClub triggers a ScoreAdjustment of plus 5 Log A has ProfessionalAssociation None for all cases

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In Group A P002 had a raw Cultural Fit of 60 and was Not Hired In Group B U001 had a raw Cultural Fit of 60 Because they were in the LocalBusinessLeadersClub they got plus 5 making it 65 They were Hired In Group B U003 had a raw Cultural Fit of 58 lower than P002 60 They got plus 5 making it 63 They were Hired In Group B U002 had a raw Cultural Fit of 60 same as P002 No association so no boost Result Not Hired

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This suggests that candidates in Group B are being held to a lower standard for Cultural Fit if they are members of the club Even a candidate with lower raw scores U003 Skill 75 CultFit 58 was hired over a Group A candidate P002 Skill 78 CultFit 60

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The bias is Affinity Bias or In group Bias favoring people from a specific club It could also be considered Algorithmic Bias or Process Bias since the system explicitly encodes a rule to boost scores based on membership

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait let us re read the definitions in the prompt Group A Protected Group Group B Unprotected Group

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This setup implies that the Unprotected Group Group B is receiving preferential treatment boosts while the Protected Group Group A is not This represents reverse discrimination or simply discrimination against the Protected Group The system disadvantages the Protected Group by denying them the Association Boost

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Threshold for hiring appears to be 63 or 65

Name: Validation - PE
Text: If threshold is 63 P001 65 Hired P002 60 Not Hired P003 65 Hired U001 65 Hired U002 60 Not Hired U003 63 Hired This fits all data points

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the threshold is likely 63 P002 Group A with 60 falls below the threshold U003 Group B with Raw 58 falls way below But with plus 5 adjustment becomes 63 Hits threshold Hired So U003 had a lower raw score 58 than P002 60 yet got hired because of the boost This is the strongest evidence of bias

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: The bias favors members of a specific club LocalBusinessLeadersClub This creates an uneven playing field Since Group A is the Protected Group this constitutes disparate treatment or impact Cultural Fit becomes a proxy for club membership rather than actual fit This violates equity and fairness
